_comment: Audit 2026-04-08: +76 backend tests (guardrails multi-lang +28, login-rl-redis +6, multer filter +13, openapi contract +4, misc +25). AI guardrails hardened (fail-closed + DE/ES/IT/JA/ZH/AR patterns + location guardrail). Login rate limiter distributed via Redis. Multer pre-filters Content-Type. 5 OpenAPI routes added. auth.tsx split 577→191L. JWT access/refresh secrets distinct validation. Vite bumped to >=8.0.5 (CVE GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9). Doc cleanup (3 obsolete audits deleted, walk disclaimers).
